checkDailyScores().details: Tracks grace period, auto-removes after 7 days below 700 H-2 FIX: Iterate in reverse to prevent index corruption when removing members

distributePayments().details: Called monthly (or per paymentInterval) Operations always funded before council H-9 Fix: Added nonReentrant to prevent reentrancy via external call

forcePaymentDistribution().details: Allows DAO to force payment outside normal schedule

returns.daysBelow: Days member has been below score 700

returns.daysBelowArray: Array of days each member has been below

checkDailyScores().notice: Check ProofScores for all council members (called daily by keeper)

checkMemberScore(address).notice: Manual check for specific member (DAO override)

distributePayments().notice: Distribute payments with priority: Operations FIRST, Council SECOND

getGracePeriodStatus(address).notice: Get grace period status for member

getMembersAtRisk().notice: Get all council members needing attention

isPaymentDue().notice: Check if payment distribution is due

resetGracePeriod(address).notice: Reset grace period for member (DAO override, use carefully)
